title: Implement Tick Creation and State Cascade
description: Implement the API endpoint to create a new tick on a campaign's timeline. This includes setting its narrative and cascading the state of all assets from the previous tick.
ai_instructions: Follow TDD. The endpoint should be protected. The core logic involves finding the latest tick, cloning its asset states, and creating a new tick record that inherits this state.
execution_steps: Write tests for the 'POST /timelines/:id/ticks' endpoint, ensuring a new tick is created and correctly inherits state from the previous one.
Run tests to see them fail.
Create 'src/controllers/TimelineController.ts' with a handler for the route.
Implement the logic for creating a new tick and cascading state.
Run tests to verify the implementation.
Add '@trace TASK-014' to all modified files.
definition_of_done: API endpoint 'POST /timelines/:id/ticks' is created and protected.
A new tick is successfully added to the timeline.
The new tick correctly inherits all asset states from the previous tick.
All tests for the tick creation feature pass.
